scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync('dist/i18n',{recursive:true}); for (const f of ['index.html','styles.css','script.js']) fs.copyFileSync(f, 'dist/' + f); for (const f of ['en.json','ar.json']) fs.copyFileSync(path.join('i18n',f), path.join('dist/i18n',f));"
